title: RHCSA 10 Lab 08: Script Arguments
description: Create a shell script that processes command-line arguments

tasks: On client, create /usr/local/bin/rhcsa10-user-report with the required argument handling.
On client, make the script executable and confirm it prints a supplied user's primary group.
hints: Test for an empty first positional parameter.
checks: test -x /usr/local/bin/rhcsa10-user-report && /usr/local/bin/rhcsa10-user-report 2>&1 | grep -qx 'usage: rhcsa10-user-report USER' && /usr/local/bin/rhcsa10-user-report root | grep -qx root
solution_outline: Make the requested configuration persistent and verify it before finishing.
task_titles: Make the script executable and confirm it prints a supplied user's
solution_commands:
cat > /usr/local/bin/rhcsa10-user-report <<'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
if [ -z "${1:-}" ]; then
  echo 'usage: rhcsa10-user-report USER' >&2
  exit 2
fi
id -gn "$1"
EOF
